title: Chinese Steel Production Remains Strong Beijings Air Pollution Remains Moderate
section_path: Chinese Steel Production Remains Strong Beijings Air Pollution Remains Moderate
section_path_text: Chinese Steel Production Remains Strong Beijings Air Pollution Remains Moderate
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Chinese steel prices remain high and finally rebounded last week. The average price of hot rolled coil, for example, ended last week at 5,705 yuan/ton which is 145 yuan (3%) more than a week ago. Previously, prices had fallen for two consecutive weeks.
